(*****************************************************************************************

 Composition of squares of profunctors

 In this file we define the vertical composition of squares of profunctors.

 Content
 1. The data
 2. The laws
 3. Composition of squares

 *****************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ â‰  _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.BenabouCosmos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Profunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.StandardProfunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Invertible.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorSquares.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Coend.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Composition.CompositionProf.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

Section CompositionSquare.
  Context {V : benabou_cosmos}
          {Câ‚پ Câ‚‚ Câ‚ƒ Câ‚پ' Câ‚‚' Câ‚ƒ' : category}
          {Fâ‚پ : Câ‚پ âں¶ Câ‚پ'}
          {Fâ‚‚ : Câ‚‚ âں¶ Câ‚‚'}
          {Fâ‚ƒ : Câ‚ƒ âں¶ Câ‚ƒ'}
          {Eâ‚پ : enrichment Câ‚پ V}
          {Eâ‚‚ : enrichment Câ‚‚ V}
          {Eâ‚ƒ : enrichment Câ‚ƒ V}
          {Eâ‚پ' : enrichment Câ‚پ' V}
          {Eâ‚‚' : enrichment Câ‚‚' V}
          {Eâ‚ƒ' : enrichment Câ‚ƒ' V}
          {EFâ‚پ : functor_enrichment Fâ‚پ Eâ‚پ Eâ‚پ'}
          {EFâ‚‚ : functor_enrichment Fâ‚‚ Eâ‚‚ Eâ‚‚'}
          {EFâ‚ƒ : functor_enrichment Fâ‚ƒ Eâ‚ƒ Eâ‚ƒ'}
          {Pâ‚پ : Eâ‚پ â†›e Eâ‚‚}
          {Pâ‚‚ : Eâ‚‚ â†›e Eâ‚ƒ}
          {Qâ‚پ : Eâ‚پ' â†›e Eâ‚‚'}
          {Qâ‚‚ : Eâ‚‚' â†›e Eâ‚ƒ'}
          (د„ : enriched_profunctor_square EFâ‚پ EFâ‚‚ Pâ‚پ Qâ‚پ)
          (خ¸ : enriched_profunctor_square EFâ‚‚ EFâ‚ƒ Pâ‚‚ Qâ‚‚).

  
V: benabou_cosmos
Câ‚پ, Câ‚‚, Câ‚ƒ, Câ‚پ', Câ‚‚', Câ‚ƒ': category
Fâ‚پ: Câ‚پ âں¶ Câ‚پ'

Fâ‚ƒ: Câ‚ƒ âں¶ Câ‚ƒ'

Eâ‚ƒ: enrichment Câ‚ƒ V
Eâ‚پ': enrichment Câ‚پ' V

Eâ‚ƒ': enrichment Câ‚ƒ' V

EFâ‚‚: functor_enrichment Fâ‚‚ Eâ‚‚ Eâ‚‚'
EFâ‚ƒ: functor_enrichment Fâ‚ƒ Eâ‚ƒ Eâ‚ƒ'

Pâ‚‚: enriched_profunctor Eâ‚‚ Eâ‚ƒ

خ¸: enriched_profunctor_square EFâ‚‚ EFâ‚ƒ Pâ‚‚ Qâ‚‚
z: Câ‚ƒ
yâ‚پ, yâ‚‚: Câ‚‚
x: Câ‚پ
lmap_e Pâ‚پ yâ‚‚ yâ‚پ x #âٹ— identity (Pâ‚‚ z yâ‚پ)
آ· (د„ yâ‚پ x #âٹ— خ¸ z yâ‚پ
   آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ z) (Fâ‚پ x)
       (Fâ‚‚ yâ‚پ)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (Eâ‚‚ â¦ƒ yâ‚پ, yâ‚‚ â¦„) (Pâ‚پ yâ‚‚ x)
#âٹ— identity (Pâ‚‚ z yâ‚پ)
آ· mon_lassociator (Pâ‚پ yâ‚‚ x) (Eâ‚‚ â¦ƒ yâ‚پ, yâ‚‚ â¦„) (Pâ‚‚ z yâ‚پ)
آ· identity (Pâ‚پ yâ‚‚ x) #âٹ— rmap_e Pâ‚‚ z yâ‚پ yâ‚‚
آ· (د„ yâ‚‚ x #âٹ— خ¸ z yâ‚‚
   آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ z) (Fâ‚پ x)
       (Fâ‚‚ yâ‚‚))

آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ z) (Fâ‚پ x)

x: Câ‚پ

z: Câ‚ƒ
y: Câ‚‚
x: Câ‚پ
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚ z x y
آ· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor z x =
د„ y x #âٹ— خ¸ z y
آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ z) (Fâ‚پ x)
    (Fâ‚‚ y)

z: Câ‚ƒ

آ· from_comp_enriched_profunctor_ob Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚ z x
    (خ» y : Câ‚‚,
     د„ y x #âٹ— خ¸ z y
     آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ z) (Fâ‚پ x)
         (Fâ‚‚ y))
    (خ» yâ‚پ yâ‚‚ : Câ‚‚,
     comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor_eq z yâ‚پ yâ‚‚
       x) =
د„ y x #âٹ— خ¸ z y
آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ z) (Fâ‚پ x)
    (Fâ‚‚ y)

z: Câ‚ƒ
y: Câ‚‚
x: Câ‚پ
د„ y x #âٹ— خ¸ z y
آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ z) (Fâ‚پ x)
    (Fâ‚‚ y) =
د„ y x #âٹ— خ¸ z y
آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ z) (Fâ‚پ x)
    (Fâ‚‚ y)

    apply idpath.

y: Câ‚‚
âˆڈ (a : V) (h : V âں¦ a, Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„ âں§),
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ x y
 آ· internal_transpose
     (identity (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
      #âٹ— comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor zâ‚پ x
      آ· lmap_e
          (precomp_enriched_profunctor EFâ‚پ EFâ‚ƒ
             (comp_enriched_profunctor Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚)) zâ‚پ zâ‚‚ x))
#âٹ— h
آ· internal_eval (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EFâ‚پ EFâ‚ƒ
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚) zâ‚‚ x) =
(comp_enriched_profunctor_in Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ x y
 آ· internal_transpose
     (lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚) zâ‚پ zâ‚‚ x
      آ· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor zâ‚‚ x))
#âٹ— h
آ· internal_eval (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor EFâ‚پ EFâ‚ƒ
       (comp_enriched_profunctor Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚) zâ‚‚ x)

Fâ‚پ: Câ‚پ âں¶ Câ‚پ'
Fâ‚‚: Câ‚‚ âں¶ Câ‚‚'
Fâ‚ƒ: Câ‚ƒ âں¶ Câ‚ƒ'
Eâ‚پ: enrichment Câ‚پ V
Eâ‚‚: enrichment Câ‚‚ V
Eâ‚ƒ: enrichment Câ‚ƒ V
Eâ‚پ': enrichment Câ‚پ' V
Eâ‚‚': enrichment Câ‚‚' V
Eâ‚ƒ': enrichment Câ‚ƒ' V
EFâ‚پ: functor_enrichment Fâ‚پ Eâ‚پ Eâ‚پ'
EFâ‚‚: functor_enrichment Fâ‚‚ Eâ‚‚ Eâ‚‚'
EFâ‚ƒ: functor_enrichment Fâ‚ƒ Eâ‚ƒ Eâ‚ƒ'
Pâ‚پ: enriched_profunctor Eâ‚پ Eâ‚‚
Pâ‚‚: enriched_profunctor Eâ‚‚ Eâ‚ƒ
Qâ‚پ: enriched_profunctor Eâ‚پ' Eâ‚‚'
Qâ‚‚: enriched_profunctor Eâ‚‚' Eâ‚ƒ'
د„: enriched_profunctor_square EFâ‚پ EFâ‚‚ Pâ‚پ Qâ‚پ
خ¸: enriched_profunctor_square EFâ‚‚ EFâ‚ƒ Pâ‚‚ Qâ‚‚
zâ‚پ, zâ‚‚: Câ‚ƒ
x: Câ‚پ
y: Câ‚‚
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ x y
#âٹ— identity (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
آ· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ x)
        (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
      آ· (identity (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
         #âٹ— comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor zâ‚پ x
         آ· lmap_e
             (precomp_enriched_profunctor EFâ‚پ EFâ‚ƒ
                (comp_enriched_profunctor Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚)) zâ‚پ
             zâ‚‚ x)) #âٹ— identity (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
   آ· internal_eval (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EFâ‚پ EFâ‚ƒ
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚) zâ‚‚ x)) =
comp_enriched_profunctor_in Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ x y
#âٹ— identity (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
آ· (internal_lam
     (sym_mon_braiding V
        (comp_enriched_profunctor Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ x)
        (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
      آ· (lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚) zâ‚پ zâ‚‚
           x
         آ· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor zâ‚‚ x))
   #âٹ— identity (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
   آ· internal_eval (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
       (precomp_enriched_profunctor EFâ‚پ EFâ‚ƒ
          (comp_enriched_profunctor Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚) zâ‚‚ x))

   آ· (identity (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)

   آ· (lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚) zâ‚پ zâ‚‚ x
      آ· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor zâ‚‚ x))

y: Câ‚‚

آ· lmap_e

y: Câ‚‚

#âٹ— identity (Qâ‚پ (Fâ‚‚ y) (Fâ‚پ x) âٹ— Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ zâ‚پ) (Fâ‚‚ y))

         (Fâ‚پ x))

Pâ‚‚: enriched_profunctor Eâ‚‚ Eâ‚ƒ

Qâ‚‚: enriched_profunctor Eâ‚‚' Eâ‚ƒ'

خ¸: enriched_profunctor_square EFâ‚‚ EFâ‚ƒ Pâ‚‚ Qâ‚‚
zâ‚پ, zâ‚‚: Câ‚ƒ
x: Câ‚پ
y: Câ‚‚
sym_mon_braiding V (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„) (Pâ‚پ y x âٹ— Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ y)
آ· (mon_lassociator (Pâ‚پ y x) (Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ y) (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
   آ· (identity (Pâ‚پ y x)
      #âٹ— sym_mon_braiding V (Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ y) (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
      آ· د„ y x
        #âٹ— (EFâ‚ƒ zâ‚‚ zâ‚پ #âٹ— خ¸ zâ‚پ y
            آ· lmap_e Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ zâ‚پ) (Fâ‚ƒ zâ‚‚) (Fâ‚‚ y))
      آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ zâ‚‚)
          (Fâ‚پ x) (Fâ‚‚ y))) =
identity (Eâ‚ƒ â¦ƒ zâ‚‚, zâ‚پ â¦„)
#âٹ— comp_enriched_profunctor_in Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚ zâ‚پ x y
آ· (lmap_e (comp_enriched_profunctor Pâ‚پ Pâ‚‚) zâ‚پ zâ‚‚ x
   آ· comp_v_enriched_profunctor_square_mor zâ‚‚ x)

        #âٹ— (EFâ‚ƒ zâ‚‚ zâ‚پ #âٹ— خ¸ zâ‚پ y

      آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ zâ‚‚)

#âٹ— h

آ· (sym_mon_braiding V (Pâ‚پ y xâ‚پ âٹ— Pâ‚‚ z y)
     (Eâ‚پ â¦ƒ xâ‚پ, xâ‚‚ â¦„)
   آ· (mon_rassociator (Eâ‚پ â¦ƒ xâ‚پ, xâ‚‚ â¦„) (Pâ‚پ y xâ‚پ)

   آ· comp_enriched_profunctor_in Qâ‚پ Qâ‚‚ (Fâ‚ƒ z) (Fâ‚پ xâ‚‚)
       (Fâ‚‚ y))

    (Fâ‚‚ y)
